name: stable_price_low_volatility
description: Boring products with stable Buy Box over 90 days. Predictable economics, suitable for repeat-buy wholesale and cash-flow planning.
thesis: Lower upside (no spike profits) but lower risk of getting trapped at a price floor. Optimises for predictability over peak ROI.

buy_box_volatility._note: Tight ±10% ceilings on Buy Box deltas — Keepa field keys (likely BUY_BOX_SHIPPING_delta30 / BUY_BOX_SHIPPING_delta90) need first-run verification + save-back.

notes: Volatility filters express ±10% over 30d AND 90d — products have to be tightly stable on both windows.
compute_stability_score flows into 04_calculate.config — populates stability_score column for capital-allocation decisions.
BSR avg90 ≤ 60k is tighter than amazon_oos_wholesale (80k): we want products that are genuinely well-known and consistently moving, not just sometimes selling.
